news.t: Industrials ETFs rally on sector broadening, airline stimulus hopes
Industrial ETFs higher on re-opening trade, stimulus hopes
Charts Patterns Show Industrial Stocks Poised for Gains

holdings.infoBox: IYJ is an equity ETF with a total of 201 individual holdings. The top holdings are Visa Inc. stock at 6.79%, Caterpillar at 5.39%, Mastercard at 4.92%, GE Aerospace at 4.44%, and GE Vernova at 3.29%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Industrials ETF (IYJ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US large- and mid-cap stocks in the industrials sector. IYJ was launched on Jun 12, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
